name: Dr. Planet
short_description: Create mini planets and civilizations. Let them flourish, or let them fall - literally. The choice is yours, Doctor Planet.
detailed_description:
Casual and relaxing colony simulation inside the laboratory. Combine different mini-planets and civilizations, then put them into the time simulation device for 1000 years. It may not be long for us humans, but for these little creatures, it's eternity.

Features:

  • Events with multiple choices

  • A lot of combinations and ways to play

  • Find the right balance between numbers

  • 12 different and unique missions

  • Sandbox mode is unlocked after completing the game

  • Hidden surprises to discover

  • Relaxing music

Story:

In the distant future, people keep whole mini-civilizations as pets, and they pay a lot of money for them. As an expert in your field, you travel through the galaxy and deliver the best colonies to customers.


Note from developer

This is a really casual and relaxing game with occasional events that affect the evolution of a colony. There is no complex management. My idea was to keep it simple and funny at times. I hope it will relax you and make your day better.
